hero.headline: Everything you need to level up
hero.subline: 17 plugins, one app. AI coaching, nutrition tracking, GPS running and much more.

pricing.heading: Free forever
pricing.valueProp2: AI coaching included in the app

Plugins.timer: Build Tabata, HIIT, EMOM and Hyrox sessions with customizable timers and exercise tracking.
Plugins.cardio: Record your runs and rides with live GPS tracking, pace, distance and elevation.
Plugins.ai-programs: Generate complete workout programs tailored to your goals with AI.
Plugins.rpe: Calculate your estimated 1RM and fine-tune session intensity using the RPE scale.
Plugins.stretching: Access stretching and mobility routines tailored to your recovery needs.
Plugins.sleep: Track your sleep quality and get a daily recovery score.
Plugins.measurements: Log your body measurements and visualize your progress over time.
Plugins.hydration: Track your daily water intake and hit your hydration goals.
Plugins.wearables: Sync Apple Health or Health Connect to centralize all your health data.
Plugins.nutrition: Log your meals, track your macros and calculate your caloric needs with the TDEE calculator.
Plugins.supplements: Browse the supplement catalog and compare prices across brands in real time.
Plugins.habits: Build daily habits, track your goals and stay consistent with AI coaching.
Plugins.persona: Customize your AI coach's style for guidance that fits your personality.
Plugins.journal: Log your mood, energy and stress levels for a complete mental well-being snapshot.
Plugins.gamification: Earn XP, level up and unlock rewards by reaching your fitness goals.
Plugins.stats: Analyze your performance with detailed charts and statistics on your progress.
Plugins.community: Join challenges, follow friends and climb community leaderboards.
